next_command_detail.description: Materialize the 90 automatable sources per docs/MATERIALIZATION_RUNBOOK.md. Requires an environment with outbound HTTPS — the web sandbox blocks egress (HTTP 403), so no producer/adapter can fetch data there.
steps: set the 8 run-time keys in .env: CENSUS_API_KEY, EIA_API_KEY, FAC_API_KEY, FEC_API_KEY, FINANCIALDATA_API_KEY, FRED_API_KEY, HIGHERGOV_API_KEY, SAM_API_KEY
materialize: python -m moneysweep.query --source <id> (41 adapter sources) and/or python3 run_all.py --strict-preflight
verify automatable_ready == automatable_total and each automatable source fully_materialized
